title: Tenebrus Baubles
description: Tenebrus baubles, inspired by Bountiful baubles and of course its inspiration terraria. brings various curios to 1.20.1!
body:
Tenebrus Baubles adds a handful of useful items that help grandly in achieving the power fantasy many of us are addicted to. Inspired by Bountiful Baubles, Terraria -Calamity and eventually more.

Before Notice, the Mod also adds a substance known as "conceptual presence" which can be obtained from crafting down curios and baubles. Used primarily in the crafting of other baubles and curios!
![Trinkets](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d37552567675cb420e9ff72418bf605471e4bc88.png)

## Currently the Mod adds 21 items.
- **Obsidian Skull**, providing fire resistance it can be crafted or obtained from **wither skeleton** drops by a **5.75% chance**
- **Dragon Scale**, providing immunity to withering, it can be crafted or obtained with a **40% chance** from slaying **the dragon**
- **The Red Balloon**, provides increased jump height, crafted or obtained with a **.04% chance** from **Zombies**
- **Walking Cane**, obtained from **Witches** with a **8% chance** or crafted, it provides immunity to blindness
- **Favoured Horseshoe**, providing fall damage immunity, it can be crafted or obtained from **ravagers** with a **6% chance**
- **Cloud in a Flagon**, or more familiarily the cloud in a bottle. it can be crafted or obtained from **Elder Guardians** with a **9% chance**
- **Angel Wings**, providing infinite extra jumps even in midair with immunity to fall damage, it can be obtained from **the wither** with a **10% chance** or crafted.
- **The Magic Mirror**, an item that teleports you "home" upon use can be crafted or obtained from **evokers** with a **14% chance** 
- **Stopwatch**, obtained from **vindicators** with a **4.7% chance**, it provides immunity to slowness. It can be crafted as all
- **Bezoar**, providing immunity to poison it comes with the deep sacrifice of either being crafted or obtained from **sniffers** with a **10% chance**
- **Skeleton Hand**, giving a 30% chance to cast the effect of bonemeal again after having used bonemeal. It can be crafted or obtined from **skeletons** with a **1.7% chance**
- **The Chronologically Aligned Bauble**, a mischevious item that slows entities hit by its wearer by 60% for 2 seconds. It can be crafted at heavy price or obtained **endermen** with a **3.4% chance**
- **Harvest Scythe**, dealing critical hits restores 1 full heart to the user, crafted or obtained from **phantoms** with a **4.3% chance**
- **The Magic Quiver**, if the user successfully hits a target with bow and arrow will have 2 new arrows generated by their feet. Crafted or obtained from **Pillagers** with a **2.4% chance**
- **Vitamin Complex**, a cure for Weakness and Mining Fatigue. It can be crafted or obtained from **Piglin brutes** with a **4.87% chance**
- **Cross Necklace**, an item that provides momentary invincibility after suffering damage, it can be obtained from **Iron golems** with a **.021% chance**. More likely crafted
- **Blindfold**, providing immunity to darkness, a simple item that is crafted or dropped by **Husks** with a **2% chance**
- **Occult Glove**, Obtained with a **1% chance** from **glowsquids**, punching something with your hands now will deal magic damage a little while after the initial stirke
- **Tree of Knowledge**, dropped by anything with a **0.05% chance** in **Cherry Grove Biomes**, providing immunity to Hunger and Nausea.
- **The Plan** , a curio dropped with a **25% chance** from **Skeleton Horses**, it provides a small boon every time a player achieves an advancement !
Titanium Ankles, dropped from **Shulkers** with a **8% chance** provides immunity to levitation .

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘
## Update 2.1.0 added the Curious Fruit, which when eaten gives an extra curios slot, up to 2 can be gotten this way.
- the Curious Bush can be rarely found in flower forests, once broken it drops the curious fruit.
